title: 2020 (disambiguation)
summary:
2020 was a leap year starting on Wednesday of the Gregorian calendar.
2020, Twenty Twenty, 20:20 or 20/20 may also refer to: 

20/20, normal visual acuity
Twenty20, a form of cricket
